LightningComponentBundle.description: Steven M Schrab’s Visual Style Guide for LWR Sites

property.name: startingPage
property.label: Starting Page
property.description: First page to display when page loads.

property.name: addCustom
property.label: Add Custom Page
property.description: Add a Custom tab where you can drag and drop custom components. Note: picking “custom” as your Starting Page will automatically display the custom tab.
